    EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity
    Specifies whether an end point is inclusive or exclusive.

    Method
    Description
    EfsIndexEndpoint.Builder
    EfsIndexEndpoint.Builder.indexOffset(int offset, EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity clusivity)
    Sets index offset to given value and clusivity.
    EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder
    EfsDurationEndpoint.Builder.now(EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity clusivity)
    Sets time offset to zero with the given clusivity.
    EfsIndexEndpoint.Builder
    EfsIndexEndpoint.Builder.now(EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity clusivity)
    Sets index offset to zero with the given clusivity.
    EfsTimeEndpoint.Builder
    EfsTimeEndpoint.Builder.now(EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity clusivity)
    Sets endpoint time to current time, interval location to EfsIntervalEndpoint.IntervalLocation.NOW, and clusivity to given value.

    Sets interval time and clusivity.
